message:
🐛 Fix UserManagement container not expanding to full content height (#10662) (#10673)

Change h-full to min-h-full on both wrapper divs so the background
container grows with the user list instead of clipping at viewport height.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
